title: FoF Union Feed
description: Configuration for a weighted-aggregation union feed (union.fof). Child feeds live in subdirectories named by their keys in the 'weights' map.

id.description: Local identifier for this feed (used as directory name).

weights.description: Map of child feed directory names to their sampling weights. Higher weight means higher selection probability.

additionalProperties.description: Sampling weight for this child feed.

max_age.description: Maximum article age inherited by child feeds that don't set their own. Examples: "7d", "12h", "30m".

purge_age.description: Age after which articles are purged from the local cache. Same format as max_age.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last configuration update. Managed automatically by FoF.
